ab: Desun maku lmiqu ka ali saya.
ch: A:我今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: Eguw preko lmiqu mesa ka bubu.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子。
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: Desun maku yqeyaq ka ali saya.
ch: A:我今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: Maha ta tmabul?
ch: B:我們要去翻土嗎?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: Maha ta inu ka ali saya?
ch: A:我們今天要去哪裡?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: Desun maku siyo yayung.
ch: B:老師要帶我們去河邊。
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: Maha ta inu ka ali saya?
ch: A:我們今天要去哪裡?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: Desun tana lmiqu mptgesa.
ch: B:老師要帶我們去山上。
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: Maha ta siyo yayung ka ali saya?
ch: A:我們今天要去河邊嗎?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: Uxe, desun tana lmiqu mptgesa.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: Maha ta lmiqu ka ali saya?
ch: A:我們今天要去山上嗎?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: Uxe, maha ta yqeyaq ka ali saya.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: Mptgesa, maha ta qmita maanu ka siyo yayung?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: Maha ta qmita pdaus.
ch: B:我們去看蜻蜓。
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: Mptgesa, maha ta qmita maanu ka lmiqu?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: Maha ta qmita plale.
ch: B:我們去看蝴蝶。
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: Maha ta hmuwa ka yqeyaq?
ch: A:我們到田裡要做什麼?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: Maha ta qmita pnhuma ta srqemu. Tai hari niqal qtahi, ma walu wa!
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: Mptgesa, maha ta lmanguy yayung?
ch: A:老師我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: Uxe, maha ta qmita pdaus.
ch: B:不是，我們要去看蜻蜓。
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: Maha ta mhuma sama yqeyaq?
ch: A:老師我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: Uxe, maha ta tmabul.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去翻土。
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: Pdaus ga ini gdema skiya waga.
ch: A:那裡有蜻蜓飛來飛去。
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: Saya ba bale ka ni ku qmita pdaus muudus.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: Plale ga ini gdema skiya waga.
ch: A:那裡有蝴蝶飛來飛去。
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: Uwa! Snkuxul ku plale! Malu ba qtaan.
ch: B:哇! 我喜歡蝴蝶，很漂亮。
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: Plale ka ga skiya waga.
ch: A:那裡有蝴蝶飛來飛去。
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: Uxe plale ka kiya, walu ka kiya.
ch: B:那不是蝴蝶，那是蜜蜂。
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: Eniq hini qmita, iya osa theya wa!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: Un! Uxe miya maha theya.
ch: B:好！我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: Iya ttalang, tghuwe mkkesa, tkure namu.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得你們跌倒。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: Ni ku mtaaguh mqqmita ka yaku.
ch: B:我想趕快看到。
en: I want to see them right away.
